## Summary

Describe the problem and the resulting behavior. Link the issue or design discussion when
one exists.

## Verification

List the commands and scenarios used to verify the change.

- [ ] `make ci`
- [ ] Documentation and examples are accurate
- [ ] New or changed behavior has test coverage

## Operational impact

State any effect on configuration, storage format, HTTP compatibility, resource usage,
security boundaries, deployment, rollout, or rollback. Write `None` when there is no
operational impact.

## Review notes

Call out non-obvious decisions, intentionally excluded work, and the files or commits where
review should begin.
